rationale: This is a classic puzzle/parking-jam "relaxation" hook that fundamentally mismatches Mob Control's energetic, competitive aim-and-shoot mob-multiplier loop — the emotional pitch (calm/relax) directly contradicts the game's competitive UI mood and screenshot signals (massive crowds, multiplier gates). Palette is also off-brand: muted greys and orange vs. Mob Control's signature royal purple + cyan + yellow, and there's no cannon, mob, or gate gameplay shown to bridge to actual install intent. Audience overlap is partial (broad casual mobile) but the male-skewing strategy/competition crowd Mob Control wants will bounce; do not greenlight this archetype — if testing satisfaction, build a Mob-Control-native version (gate-stacking ASMR, crowd-growth oddly-satisfying) instead.
